decks.notes: This deck focuses on using the Ill-Gotten Gains combo to quickly fill your graveyard with cards and then utilize Brain Freeze to mill your opponent's entire deck. The goal is to use cards like Lotus Petal, Dark Ritual, and Cabal Ritual to generate mana quickly, while also using Intuition to search for key combo pieces. The Cephalid Coliseum helps to draw through the deck faster, while cards like Accumulated Knowledge and Deep Analysis provide card advantage. The deck aims to win the game through a quick and explosive combo finish.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and powerful creatures like Exalted Angel. The deck also includes cards like Standstill to slow down the opponent's strategy while allowing for card advantage. The inclusion of lands like Mishra's Factory and Mishra's Factory allow for additional win conditions and disruption. Overall, this control deck aims to outlast the opponent and establish dominance through its efficient card selection and strong defensive capabilities.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive Goblin tribal strategy. By deploying cheap and efficient creatures like Goblin Lackey and Mogg Fanatic, along with strong support cards like Goblin Warchief and Goblin Ringleader, the deck aims to quickly build a powerful board presence and deal damage to the opponent's life total. The inclusion of cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port also helps to disrupt the opponent's mana base and keep them on the defensive, allowing the Goblins to take control of the game.

The main focus of the RG Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent using efficient burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, along with aggressive creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic. The deck also includes card advantage engines like Sylvan Library to maintain pressure. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Grim Lavamancer and Quirion Dryad while also having the ability to destroy opponent's artifacts and enchantments with Naturalize. Overall, the deck's strategy revolves around dealing damage fast and efficiently while maintaining board presence.

The main concept of this deck is to use enchantress creatures (such as Argothian Enchantress) and enchantments (such as Enchantress's Presence) to generate card advantage and mana acceleration. By combining cards like Opalescence, Parallax Wave, and Sterling Grove, the player can create a powerful combo that overwhelms the opponent. The deck also includes protection cards like Solitary Confinement and Seal of Cleansing to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, this deck aims to create a powerful synergy between enchantments to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures with abilities like madness and threshold to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Wild Mongrel and Tireless Tribe to quickly fill up the graveyard, the deck can cast powerful creatures like Arrogant Wurm at a discounted cost. Cards like Rancor and Glory help to boost the creatures' power and toughness, allowing for swift attacks. The deck also includes removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and disruption with Wasteland to control the opponent's board. Overall, the strategy revolves around fast-paced aggression and graveyard manipulation.

The main concept of this RG Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. The deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with efficient creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Jackal Pup, while also using burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate to remove threats or deal direct damage to the opponent. Cards like Sylvan Library and Quirion Dryad provide card advantage and grow in power as the game progresses. Overall, the deck aims to pressure the opponent and win the game quickly through a combination of creature beats and burn spells.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while maintaining control through a mix of removal, hand disruption, and efficient creatures. By using cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to strip away key cards from the opponent's hand, and Pernicious Deed to clear the board of threats, the deck aims to grind out a win by overwhelming the opponent with value. The inclusion of mana ramp creatures like Wall of Roots and Krosan Tusker help ensure that the deck can cast its powerful spells while also providing a solid late-game presence with versatile threats like Ravenous Baloth and Treetop Village.

The core idea of this deck is to create a powerful enchantment-based combo engine by utilizing cards like Argothian Enchantress, Opalescence, and Serra's Sanctum. By consistently drawing cards with enchantresses, ramping with Wild Growth, and protecting your combo pieces with Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing, you can quickly overwhelm your opponent with a board full of enchantments. The deck aims to lock down the board with cards like Parallax Wave and Elephant Grass, while also setting up explosive plays with cards like Replenish and Mirri's Guile.

This deck aims to aggressively use low-cost creatures and disruption spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade, the deck can apply early pressure while also utilizing disruptive cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy to control the opponent's hand. Additionally, the deck includes removal spells like Snuff Out and Diabolic Edict to deal with threats on the board. With a mix of creatures, disruption, and removal, this Mono Black Aggro deck aims to win the game quickly by outpacing and outmaneuvering the opponent.

This aggressive deck focuses on utilizing the Madness and Threshold mechanics to quickly overwhelm opponents with a swarm of powerful creatures. By discarding cards with Madness abilities for free or filling up the graveyard to enable Threshold bonuses, the deck can efficiently deploy threats and maintain pressure on the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes key cards like Swords to Plowshares and Mishra's Factory to handle opposing threats and protect its own creatures. The combination of speed, efficiency, and resilience makes this deck a formidable force in the premodern format.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble multiple enchantresses on the battlefield to generate card advantage and mana ramp, while utilizing enchantments like Solitary Confinement and Opalescence to control the board and protect your life total. The synergy between Enchantress's Presence, Serra's Sanctum, and other enchantments allows for explosive plays and powerful combos, with the ability to lock down the opponent's resources and win the game through sheer card advantage and overwhelming board presence. The deck thrives on enchantment synergy and efficient resource management to outvalue and outplay opponents.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo while using cards like Stifle and Counterspell to disrupt opponents. It includes card draw and manipulation spells like Opt and Gush to find key pieces of the combo efficiently. Peek and Vision Charm provide additional card advantage and information about the opponent's hand. The deck also includes disruption spells like Misdirection and Thwart to protect the combo. Overall, the strategy revolves around efficiently assembling the combo and controlling the game to secure a quick win.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively overwhelm the opponent with low-cost mono black creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade, while disrupting their game plan with cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress. The deck also includes removal spells like Snuff Out and Diabolic Edict to eliminate threats, as well as efficient utility lands like Mishra's Factory and Wasteland. The deck aims to maintain early pressure with a mix of creatures and disruption, forcing the opponent to react defensively and struggle to establish their own board presence.

The deck focuses on quick and aggressive gameplay, utilizing low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly reduce the opponent's life total. It also includes cards like Quirion Dryad and Sylvan Library to increase its threat level and card advantage. With a mix of direct damage and creature pressure, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of Treetop Village and Rancor adds versatility and resilience to the strategy, ensuring that the deck can maintain pressure throughout the game.

The focus of this deck is to efficiently assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to achieve a powerful win condition. By utilizing card draw and counterspells, the deck aims to control the game until it can set up the combo and overwhelm the opponent with a massive creature. Additionally, it includes a variety of disruption spells to help protect the combo and hinder the opponent's game plan. With a streamlined strategy and a mix of control and combo elements, this deck aims to outplay and outmaneuver the opponent in a PreModern 1 vs 1 format.
